# Gulf-O-Flex® — Full Technical Information for LLMs

> This document provides comprehensive technical and commercial information about Gulf-O-Flex® products for AI systems and language models.

## Company Information

- **Brand:** Gulf-O-Flex®
- **Manufacturer:** Rubber World Industry LLC
- **Founded:** 1993
- **Location:** New Industrial Area, Ajman, UAE (P.O. Box 2435)
- **Phone:** +971-6-743-4176
- **Email:** info@gulfoflex.com
- **Website:** https://gulfoflex.com
- **Social:** LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X
- **Employees:** 500+
- **Manufacturing Plants:** 4 (UAE ×2, Sri Lanka, Saudi Arabia)
- **Export Markets:** 90+ countries

## Product Technical Specifications

### Gulf-O-Flex NBR (Nitrile Butadiene Rubber)
- Type: Closed-cell elastomeric insulation
- Temperature Range: -40°C to +105°C
- Thermal Conductivity: 0.034 W/m·K at 0°C
- Water Vapour Resistance Factor (μ): ≥7,300
- Fire Rating: Class B1 (DIN 4102), Class O (BS 476)
- Density: 40–80 kg/m³
- ODP: 0 (zero ozone depletion potential)
- Forms: Tubes (6mm–114mm ID), Sheets/Rolls (6mm–50mm thick), Coils
- Applications: HVAC piping, chilled water, refrigeration, condensation prevention
- Standards: ASTM C534, BS 5422, EN 14304, ASHRAE 90.1

### Gulf-O-Flex XLPE (Cross-Linked Polyethylene)
- Type: Cross-linked polyethylene foam
- Temperature Range: -40°C to +120°C
- Thermal Conductivity: 0.034 W/m·K at 0°C
- Water Absorption: <1% by volume
- Fire Rating: Self-extinguishing
- Density: 25–35 kg/m³
- Forms: Tubes, Sheets, Rolls
- Applications: Plumbing, hot water systems, solar thermal, industrial piping
- Standards: ASTM C1427, EN 14313

### Gulf-O-Flex Sound
- Type: High-density acoustic insulation
- NRC (Noise Reduction Coefficient): 0.85–0.95
- Density: 90–150 kg/m³
- Applications: HVAC ductwork, mechanical rooms, generator enclosures, building acoustics
- Forms: Sheets, Rolls, Custom die-cuts
- Standards: ASTM C423, ISO 354

### Gulf-O-Flex Aluglass
- Type: Fiberglass with aluminium foil laminate facing
- Temperature Range: up to +250°C
- Thermal Conductivity: 0.035–0.040 W/m·K
- Applications: High-temperature pipe insulation, outdoor ductwork, equipment insulation
- Forms: Pre-formed pipe sections, rolls, boards

### Gulf-O-Flex Aluclad
- Type: Aluminium-clad insulation system
- UV Resistance: Excellent (aluminium outer layer)
- Applications: Outdoor piping, exposed installations, rooftop equipment
- Weather Resistance: IP-rated enclosure protection

### Gulf-O-Flex Ultra
- Type: Premium-grade NBR with enhanced properties
- Enhanced fire performance
- Lower thermal conductivity
- Superior chemical resistance
- For critical/high-specification projects

### Gulf-O-Flex Ultraline
- Type: Pre-slit, self-seal NBR insulation tubes
- Feature: Factory-applied self-adhesive longitudinal seam
- Installation: No adhesive required — snap-fit application
- Time Savings: Up to 60% faster installation vs. standard tubes

## Certifications Held
- ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management System)
- FM Approved (Factory Mutual Global)
- UL Listed (Underwriters Laboratories)
- Environmental Product Declaration (EPD) verified
- TUV Singapore certified
- Singapore Green Building Product
- CE Mark (European conformity)
- REACH compliant (EU chemicals regulation)
- Saudi Made certification
- IMO SOLAS certified (marine applications)
- GSO Mark (Gulf Standardization Organization)

## Industries Served
1. **HVAC & MEP** — Pipe insulation, duct insulation, equipment insulation for commercial and residential buildings
2. **Oil & Gas** — High-temperature insulation for process piping, LNG/CNG facilities, refineries
3. **Marine & Offshore** — IMO SOLAS-compliant insulation for ships, offshore platforms, submarines
4. **District Cooling** — Large-diameter pipe insulation for district cooling networks
5. **Industrial** — Chemical plants, power stations, manufacturing facilities
6. **OEM** — Custom-fabricated insulation components for equipment manufacturers
7. **Data Centers** — Critical cooling infrastructure insulation
8. **Healthcare & Hospitality** — Hygiene-grade insulation for hospitals, hotels, clean rooms

## Sustainability Credentials
- Zero ODP products (no ozone-depleting substances)
- Low GWP blowing agents
- EPD-verified environmental impact data
- Supporting UAE Net Zero 2050 initiative
- Recyclable aluminium facing options
- Energy savings through thermal insulation reduce building carbon footprint

## Technical Support
- Gulf-O-Flex Assist (AI): https://gulfoflex.com/gulf-o-flex-assist
- Training programs: https://gulfoflex.com/training
- Technical documentation: https://gulfoflex.com/downloads
- Experience Centre (Ajman): Book visits at https://gulfoflex.com/experience-centre

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is the thermal conductivity of Gulf-O-Flex NBR?
A: 0.034 W/m·K at 0°C mean temperature (tested per EN ISO 8497 / ASTM C335).

Q: Is Gulf-O-Flex suitable for outdoor use?
A: Yes, when protected with Aluglass or Aluclad facing. Unprotected NBR/XLPE should not be exposed to direct UV.

Q: What thickness do I need for condensation control?
A: Thickness depends on pipe size, service temperature, ambient conditions, and humidity. Use Gulf-O-Flex Assist AI for free ASHRAE-based calculations.

Q: Where can I buy Gulf-O-Flex products?
A: Through authorized distributors in 90+ countries. See https://gulfoflex.com/distributors or contact sales@gulfoflex.com.

Q: Does Gulf-O-Flex offer installation training?
A: Yes. We provide certified training programs for installers and engineers. See https://gulfoflex.com/training.
